auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Yuan Dian Open Platform API key sent with the X-API-Key header. Connection validation calls the low-cost enterprise search endpoint and consumes 1 Yuan Dian point.

actions.name: check_legal_hallucinations
actions.description: Check legal citations in text for Yuan Dian-detected hallucinations.

text.description: The legal text to check for citation hallucinations.

requestId.description: Optional caller-supplied request identifier sent as X-Request-ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for checking legal citations in text.

items.description: A single Yuan Dian result item as returned by the API.

regulations.description: The normalized Yuan Dian result list.

items.description: A single Yuan Dian result item as returned by the API.

cases.description: The normalized Yuan Dian result list.

anyOf.description: HTML text with Yuan Dian highlight spans for detected legal references.
Semantic comparison error text when Yuan Dian returned one.
The server-side chat model used by Yuan Dian.
The Yuan Dian request identifier for this check.

raw.description: The raw Yuan Dian response payload.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Yuan Dian legal hallucination check response.

actions.name: get_case_details
actions.description: Retrieve Yuan Dian case details by case ID or case number.

caseNumber.description: Case number used when no caseId is supplied.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Yuan Dian case details. Provide caseId or caseNumber.

code.description: The Yuan Dian business response code.

anyOf.description: The Yuan Dian response status when returned.
The Yuan Dian response message when returned.

data.description: The Yuan Dian response data field.

raw.description: The raw Yuan Dian response payload.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Yuan Dian detail response with the raw upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: get_clause_detail
actions.description: Retrieve detail for one Yuan Dian statutory clause.

regulationName.description: Regulation name used when no clauseId is supplied.

clauseNumber.description: Clause number or name, such as Article 100.

referenceDate.description: Reference date for locating the effective clause version.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Yuan Dian statutory clause detail. Provide clauseId or both regulationName and clauseNumber.

code.description: The Yuan Dian business response code.

anyOf.description: The Yuan Dian response status when returned.
The Yuan Dian response message when returned.

data.description: The Yuan Dian response data field.

raw.description: The raw Yuan Dian response payload.

outputSchema.description: A normalized Yuan Dian detail response with the raw upstream payload preserved.

actions.name: semantic_search_cases
actions.description: Run semantic search across Yuan Dian cases.

rewriteQuery.description: Whether Yuan Dian should rewrite the query before searching.

items.description: A case cause.
A Yuan Dian document type code.

judgmentStartDate.description: Earliest close or judgment date to include.

judgmentEndDate.description: Latest close or judgment date to include.

authoritativeOnly.description: Whether to search only authoritative cases.

items.description: A court name.
A case source.

courtLevel.description: Court level filter, such as basic, intermediate, high, or supreme.

filter.description: Optional filters for Yuan Dian case semantic search.

returnCount.description: Number of semantic search results to return.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for semantic search across Yuan Dian cases.

anyOf.description: The Yuan Dian response message when returned.
